scenes.description: Continuing the previous round's target practice.
The group discusses the difficulty of the rear targets.
Shishiro Botan takes her turn at target practice.
The group reacts to Botan's attempt and Matsuri prepares for her turn.
Natsuiro Matsuri takes her turn at target practice.
The group discusses strategy, suggesting it's better to focus on one target.
Tokoyami Towa takes her turn at target practice.
The group reflects on the high difficulty of the targets.
Level 3 is introduced, featuring a zombie-like moving target.
Tokoyami Towa attempts the zombie target and manages to clear it.
The group reacts to Towa's success and Matsuri steps up.
Natsuiro Matsuri attempts the zombie target and clears it in record time.

subtitles.original: うて、うて、うて、うて！
subtitles.english: Fire, fire, fire, fire!

subtitles.original: うて、うて、うて、うて！ぐるんぐるんだから、カメラ。
subtitles.english: Fire, fire, fire, fire! The camera's spinning all around.

subtitles.original: Time's up!
subtitles.english: Time's up!

subtitles.original: あとね、すごいよ1個。
subtitles.english: Also, one of those was amazing.

subtitles.original: あの後ろ向きでね。
subtitles.english: You know, the one facing backwards.

subtitles.original: 絶対行きたい！絶対行きたい！
subtitles.english: I definitely want to go! I definitely want to go!

subtitles.original: はい、じゃあ絶対行きましょう。頑張れ、ぼたん君！
subtitles.english: Alright then, let's definitely go. Good luck, Botan-kun!

subtitles.original: ラプラスみたいに後ろ向かなくていい？
subtitles.english: Don't I need to face backwards like La+?

subtitles.original: うん、大丈夫。
subtitles.english: Yeah, it's fine.

subtitles.original: 遊びよ…メタの調整行きましょう！
subtitles.english: It's time to play... let's adjust the meta!

subtitles.original: Three, Two, One, Start!
subtitles.english: Three, Two, One, Start!

subtitles.original: 頑張れー！
subtitles.english: Go for it!

subtitles.original: Time's up!
subtitles.english: Time's up!

subtitles.original: あー、残念！ぼたん君、惜しいです！
subtitles.english: Ah, too bad! You were so close, Botan-kun!

subtitles.original: めちゃくちゃむずい…これむずいよ。
subtitles.english: It's incredibly hard... this is tough.

subtitles.original: いや、でも惜しかったな。
subtitles.english: No, but that was really close.

subtitles.original: 裏がやばい、裏…裏だったからすごい惜しい。
subtitles.english: The ones behind are the problem... that was so close since it was behind.

subtitles.original: 最後やから、まつり行かせてください。
subtitles.english: Since it's the last one, please let me go, Matsuri.

subtitles.original: はい、じゃあまつり先輩、行くぞ！
subtitles.english: Alright then, Matsuri-senpai is going in!

subtitles.original: うめ！うめ、うめ、うめ！
subtitles.english: Nice shot! Nice, nice, nice!

subtitles.original: マジ？あ、惜しい！
subtitles.english: Really? Ah, so close!

subtitles.original: Time's up!
subtitles.english: Time's up!

subtitles.original: 怖いです。弱いのではありません。
subtitles.english: It's scary. I'm not weak.

subtitles.original: 悔しい！2個か。
subtitles.english: So frustrating! Was that two?

subtitles.original: いや、2個もすごいよ。1だよね。
subtitles.english: No, two is also great. It was one before, right?

subtitles.original: なんかこれ、トワ様気づいたぞ、あっち。
subtitles.english: I think I noticed something about that, over there.

subtitles.original: 追わない方がいい。
subtitles.english: It's better not to chase them.

subtitles.original: 絶対そう。トワも思ってた。一点集中！
subtitles.english: Definitely. I thought so too. Focus on one point!

subtitles.original: アドバイスを活かして、やろうかな。
subtitles.english: Maybe I'll try putting that advice to use.

subtitles.original: トワチの挑戦、3, 2, 1, Go!
subtitles.english: Towa-chi's challenge, 3, 2, 1, Go!

subtitles.original: Time's up!
subtitles.english: Time's up!

subtitles.original: 難しいんだいよ！これクソむずじゃん！
subtitles.english: It's so hard! This is freaking difficult!

subtitles.original: 1枚でした。一緒、トワさん。一緒っす。
subtitles.english: It was one. Same here, Towa-san. We're the same.

subtitles.original: 後ろ向いてるやつ、申し訳ないけど、後ろの人と一緒。本当にむず。
subtitles.english: The ones facing backwards... I'm sorry, but it's the same as the people behind. Really hard.

subtitles.original: Level 3
subtitles.english: Level 3

subtitles.original: 普通の的、動く的ときて、なんとこちら！ボーン！
subtitles.english: First normal targets, then moving targets, and now this! Bam!

subtitles.original: ええー！キモい！キモい！ゾンビ！
subtitles.english: Eww! Gross! Gross! A zombie!

subtitles.original: ゾンビの、動く的になってます。
subtitles.english: It's a zombie, functioning as a moving target.

subtitles.original: でも的自体は2つしかないから。
subtitles.english: But there are only two actual targets.

subtitles.original: 確かに…こちらを狙って…なんか気持ち悪いポーズもしてます。
subtitles.english: True... aim for these... and it's making some gross poses too.

subtitles.original: 気持ち悪い！自我がな！
subtitles.english: Gross! It has a mind of its own!

subtitles.original: トワチからじゃあ行きましょう。3, 2, 1, Go!
subtitles.english: Let's start with Towa-chi. 3, 2, 1, Go!

subtitles.original: やめてよ！イージー、イージー、イージー！
subtitles.english: Stop it! Easy, easy, easy!

subtitles.original: Clear
subtitles.english: Clear

subtitles.original: イエス！ギリギリセーフ！
subtitles.english: Yes! Barely made it!

subtitles.original: すごいギリギリだった。2つ獲られました。
subtitles.english: That was a close one. You got two.

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます。イエーイ、すごい！
subtitles.english: Thank you. Yay, that's great!

subtitles.original: なんかゾンビがたまに自我を持ち始めて不思議な動きをするので皆様注意を
subtitles.english: Sometimes the zombies start to have a mind of their own and move strangely, so everyone please be careful.

subtitles.original: 行きたい、行きたい！じゃあ二ちゃんね。頑張るぞ！
subtitles.english: I want to go, I want to go! Then it's Ni-chan's turn. Good luck!

subtitles.original: じゃあまつりちゃん…
subtitles.english: Then, Matsuri-chan...

subtitles.original: まつりちゃん、3, 2, 1, どうぞ！
subtitles.english: Matsuri-chan, 3, 2, 1, go ahead!

subtitles.original: はやっ！はやっ！マジ？
subtitles.english: So fast! That was quick! Seriously?

subtitles.original: Clear
subtitles.english: Clear

subtitles.original: 3秒で終わりました。3秒！
subtitles.english: Finished in 3 seconds. 3 seconds!

subtitles.original: 3秒で！ええー！
subtitles.english: In 3 seconds! What?!
